mapper.select: SELECT c.*, COALESCE(COUNT(p.id), 0) as product_count FROM biz_product_category c LEFT JOIN biz_product p ON c.id = p.category_id AND p.is_deleted = false WHERE c.is_deleted = false GROUP BY c.id ORDER BY c.sort_order, c.id
mapper.update: UPDATE biz_product_category SET category_name = #{categoryName}, parent_id = #{parentId}, level = #{level}, sort_order = #{sortOrder}, status = #{status}, updated_by = #{updatedBy}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}
